---
title: "Robin Lovelace"
description-meta: "Professor of Transport Data Science at University of Leeds"
image: "files/images/avatar.jpg"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
page-layout: full

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 70%
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:r.lovelace@leeds.ac.uk
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/robinlovelace
      target: _blank
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/robinlovelace
      target: _blank
    - icon: youtube
      text: YouTube
      href: https://www.youtube.com/c/RobinLovelace
      target: _blank
    - icon: mastodon
      text: Mastodon
      href: https://fosstodon.org/web/@robinlovelace
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.co.uk/citations?user=xDJHVCAAAAAJ&hl=en
      target: _blank

listing:
  - id: recent-posts
    contents: 
      - posts
      - posts/post-links.yml
    exclude:
      title: ""
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
    page-size: 3
    fields: [image, date, title, subtitle]
    max-description-length: 100
    sort: 
      - "date desc"
---

:::{#hero-heading}

I'm a [Professor of Transport Data Science](https://environment.leeds.ac.uk/transport/staff/953/dr-robin-lovelace) at the [University of Leeds](https://www.leeds.ac.uk/) [Institute for Transport Studies](https://environment.leeds.ac.uk/transport)(ITS), where I undertake research, develop software and web applications, and teach data science for evidence-based transport planning.

## Research Interests

- **Geocomputation** - spatial data analysis and modeling
- **Transport modelling** - active travel uptake and route modeling
- **Reproducible research** - open source software and data-driven methods
- **Decarbonising transport** - evidence-based planning for sustainable mobility

## Current Projects

- **SaferActive** - Improving safety for active travel through data-driven approaches
- **Propensity to Cycle Tool (PCT)** - Online tool for cycling potential modeling
- **Transport Data Science** - Teaching module for Masters students

## Recent Work

I share lots of code for data science and reproducible research. Check out my [GitHub](https://github.com/robinlovelace/) for projects and the [posts](/posts.qmd) section for blog entries.

If you'd like to get in touch, feel free to [email me](mailto:r.lovelace@leeds.ac.uk).

:::
